title: ObservabilityRecord
description: A structured observability record capturing performance, grounding quality, and failure signals for a single pass or case evaluation.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this observability record.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this record was emitted.

context.description: Context information linking the record to an artifact, pipeline stage, and optional case.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact being measured.

artifact_type.description: Type of artifact (e.g. pass_result, pass_chain_record, evaluation_result).

case_id.description: Golden case identifier, if this record relates to an evaluation case.

pipeline_stage.description: Pipeline stage where this metric was captured.

pass_info.description: Information about the pass that produced this record.

pass_type.description: Type of the pass (e.g. extraction, reasoning, adversarial).

metrics.description: Quantitative performance metrics captured for this record.

grounding_score.description: Fraction of claims that are grounded (0.0–1.0).

latency_ms.description: Latency in milliseconds for this pass or case.

flags.description: Boolean quality-gate flags for this record.

schema_valid.description: Whether all pass outputs passed schema validation.

grounding_passed.description: Whether all claims passed grounding verification.

regression_passed.description: Whether no score regression was detected.

human_disagrees.description: Whether a human reviewer disagreed with the system output.

error_summary.description: Summary of errors associated with this record.

error_types.description: List of AU-aligned error types present in this record.
